title: Atmospheric
description: a Datapack and Resourcepack that changes the weather and atmosphere in all 3 dimensions work!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0lnIsNlOj3w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **WELP ITS FINALLY DONE....**

After 3 months of work this datapack is done! this datapack has everything in it that you would expect to fine in a minecraft update.



more advancements
more features and mechanics
more items and enchantments
overhauling a game element making it better



this datapack is huge and id advise not using the worldgen version unless you got a good computer 

so.. if youve seen my "void's localized weather" this datapack is like that but better with all 3 dimensions having weather and each with there own gimmicks and stuff in addition to a new plant and a new tree, ill list off the weather elements:



Rainstorm
Snowstorm
Hailstorm
Lightningstorm
Windstorm
Tornado
Hurricane
Blizzard
Dust Devil
Sandstorm
Fog
Acid Rain
Firenado
Emberstorm
Endstorm
Voidnado

adding up to a total of 16 weather elements not including the wind mechanic and pressure mechanic then you get the corn and Morningstar tree.



id highly recommend watching the video for every piece of information about this datapack



and i hope you all have alot of fun!
also please dont press the quick download button. click on the actual version so you can get the resourcepack too!
